title: Squirrel Removal in Prospect Heights, Brooklyn | $900-$2,500
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Prospect Heights, Brooklyn. Safe, humane extraction and exclusion. Serving historic brownstones and modern buildings. Call today for a free inspection!
intro: Squirrels invading your Prospect Heights home through roof vents, chimneys, or attic spaces? Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive squirrel removal services tailored to the unique architecture of Prospect Heights' beautiful brownstones and historic buildings. Our humane removal process includes complete extraction, entry point sealing, and prevention strategies to keep your property squirrel-free.
whyUs: With over a decade of experience serving Prospect Heights and surrounding Brooklyn neighborhoods, we understand the specific challenges posed by squirrels in this area's mix of historic and contemporary residences. Our licensed technicians use proven, humane methods and provide warranty-backed exclusion work to ensure long-term results.
localContext: Prospect Heights' tree-lined streets near Prospect Park and Grand Army Plaza create an ideal habitat for squirrels, who often seek shelter in the area's charming brownstones, limestone townhouses, and newer residential buildings. The neighborhood's proximity to the park means increased squirrel activity, making professional exclusion services essential for protecting your home's structural integrity and attic spaces.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Prospect Heights?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Prospect Heights typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and the extent of exclusion work needed. This includes humane trapping, removal, entry point sealing, and sanitation services. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are squirrels common in Prospect Heights brownstones?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels are very common in Prospect Heights due to the neighborhood's proximity to Prospect Park and mature tree canopy. Brownstones and older buildings often have accessible entry points through roof eaves, chimneys, and ventilation systems that squirrels exploit. Regular inspection and preventative exclusion work can protect your historic property from damage.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Prospect Heights home?
faqs.answer: Most squirrel removal projects in Prospect Heights are completed within 3-7 days, depending on the number of animals and entry points. We begin with a thorough inspection, followed by humane trapping and removal, then seal all entry points to prevent re-entry. Emergency same-day service is available for urgent situations.

faqs.question: Will squirrels damage my Prospect Heights property?
faqs.answer: Yes, squirrels can cause significant damage to homes in Prospect Heights by chewing through wood, insulation, and electrical wiring, which creates fire hazards. They also leave droppings and urine that can contaminate attic spaces and create health risks. Our comprehensive service includes damage assessment, repairs, and sanitation to restore your property to safe conditions.
